paragraph:
Velmoria's pageant of memory
A national festival tries to (subsume) grief into hope, and not (defame) the dead
LET THIS chapter not (decline) into a (pantomime). On the fifth anniversary of the marshal's fall, Velmoria convened its first national day of remembrance—a deliberate act to (convene) a fractured people and, without (fulsome) ceremony, to mark how far the republic has come since that grim (acme) of tyranny. The mood was (serene) rather than triumphant, the tone (humane) rather than (profane).
The planners were anxious not to (defame) the dead nor to (enflame) old wounds. They wanted nothing (cumbersome), nothing (irksome), nothing that might (contravene) the quiet dignity the day required. So there was no gilded (limousine), no (byzantine) protocol, no (saccharine) anthem piped through the squares. Instead the (epitome) of the event was a single (pristine) white (shrine) raised in the central (dome), where the names of the disappeared were read aloud, plain and unadorned. To (enshrine) their memory was the whole (doctrine) of the day.
It would have been easy to slip into melodrama—into (ragtime) sentiment or a (frolicsome) carnival that mistook forgetting for healing. The organisers resisted. They knew that grief is not a thing to (tame) or (subsume) under slogans, that a wound left to fester turns to (gangrene). So the festival moved at a (lissome), unhurried pace: a procession, a silence, a (winsome) chorus of schoolchildren, an old (comedienne) who chose, for once, not to joke but to weep.
The marshal's surviving (clientele) found the whole thing (irksome). A (saturnine) faction of his old (libertine) cronies muttered that the republic had grown (asinine), (puerile), too soft to govern—an (asinine) charge from men whose own (clandestine) record was (internecine) and bloody. They would gladly (undermine) the day, (defame) its organisers, and (decline) any share of the collective guilt. But their (vulpine) complaints found no purchase. The crowd, (sanguine) and (genuine), simply turned away.
History, the speakers insisted, must be told (genuine) and whole, not as a (figurine) prettified for display. The marshal was no (gnome) of folklore, no (arcane) bogeyman; he was a (sane), calculating man who chose cruelty, and to pretend otherwise would (profane) the truth. The new (doctrine) of the republic is that memory must be (humane) but unflinching—neither the (inhumane) erasure the marshal practised nor a (saccharine) myth that would (enflame) nostalgia for strongman rule.
The day had its lighter graces, too. Vendors sold (marine) delicacies and rich (cuisine) along the quay; a (tambourine) kept time for dancers; a sculptor unveiled a bronze (figurine) of an ordinary citizen, not a hero, to stand beside the (shrine). The republic's love of the (wholesome) and the small—a clean (membrane) of normal life stretched over old trauma—was everywhere. Children chased a (feline) stray; a farmer led his (bovine) and (equine) charges through the (ultramundane) bustle of the market, as (germane) to the nation's recovery as any speech.
There is science in the healing as well as ceremony. The new health ministry, (mettlesome) and well-run, has all but eradicated the (famine) that the marshal's misrule once made (predestine). Clinics stock (antihistamine) and basic (iodine) where there was nothing; researchers map the (genome) and the humble (chromosome) and the (enzyme)s of local crops to make the land (fertile) again. The work is unglamorous—(cone)s of grain counted, (canine) and (porcine) herds vaccinated, wells purified—but it is the (prime) substance of recovery, far more than any (sublime) rhetoric.
The republic remains, of course, imperfect. Its discipline can slip; a (philistine) populism still (intertwine)s with honest debate; a few would (guzzle) public funds if no one watched. Liberty is not (predestine)d to survive, and complacency is its (bane). But the people have learned to (opine) freely without fear, to (intervene) when power overreaches, to keep the (guillotine) of vengeance firmly sheathed and the (axle) of justice turning slow and true.
So the day closed not with a roar but with a long, (serene) quiet. The marshal had craved the (sublime), the (maritime) armada, the (elephantine) monument, the (divine) right of a single will. He left instead a (saga) of ruin and a lesson written in the plainest (outline): that no man is a (panacea), that a republic of fallible citizens, (sane) and (genuine) and (humane), will always (outshine) the gaudiest tyrant. Velmoria does not (repine) for what it suffered. It remembers, and it goes on.
text:
本批词根亮点：

• -ine/-ane 动物形容词家族：feline（猫科）/canine（犬科）/bovine（牛科）/equine（马科）/porcine（猪科）/ursine（熊科）/aquiline（鹰钩）/vulpine（狐狸），全来自拉丁语动物名称，加 -ine 变形容词

• saturnine：来自土星（Saturn），古占星术认为土星影响下出生的人性格阴郁，和 martial（火星=好战）、mercurial（水星=善变）同为行星词

• saccharine：来自阿拉伯语 sukkar（糖），字面意思是"含糖的"，但引申为过于甜腻=矫揉造作，saccharin（糖精）同根

• clandestine：clam（秘密）+ dest（目的地），往秘密目的地去=秘密的，clam/claim 同族

• quarantine：来自意大利语 quaranta giorni（四十天），中世纪威尼斯对疑似病船实施四十天隔离，quaranta=四十，和 quartet（四重奏）同根

• philistine：来自圣经中的腓力斯丁人（Philistines），古代以色列的敌人，后用于形容缺乏文化修养的人

• guillotine：以法国医生约瑟夫-伊尼亚斯·吉约坦命名，他提议用更人道的方式执行死刑

• sanguine：sanguis（血液），血液充沛=乐观的，古医学四体液之一，sanguine=血液质=乐观

quiz.question: ___ axle
quiz.explanation: 车轴，汽车车轴。The car axle needed repair. 汽车车轴需要修理。 | axis->轴（拉丁），axle->旋转轴（cf. axis轴线，axial轴向，axiom公理，axle shaft车轴）

quiz.question: guzzle ____
quiz.explanation: 狂饮，狂饮啤酒。Don't guzzle beer so quickly. 不要这么快狂饮啤酒。 | guzzle->贪吃贪喝（可能来自法语gosier->喉咙），guzzle->大口喝（cf. puzzle困惑，nuzzle用鼻蹭，muzzle口套，guzzler耗油车）

quiz.question: defame _ _____
quiz.explanation: 诽谤，诽谤对手。He tried to defame a rival in the campaign. 他试图在竞选中诽谤对手。 | de->否定，fame->名声（拉丁fama），defame->损毁名声=诽谤（cf. fame名声，famous著名，infamous臭名昭著，infamy耻辱）

quiz.question: enflame ________
quiz.explanation: 激起，激起激情。The speech would enflame passions. 演讲会激起激情。 | en->使，flame->火焰（拉丁flamma），enflame->使燃起=激起（cf. inflame点燃，flamboyant炫耀，flamingo火烈鸟，flammable易燃）

quiz.question: tame ______
quiz.explanation: 驯服的，驯服的动物。The tame animal obeyed commands. 驯服的动物服从命令。 | tam->驯服（古英语tamian），tame->驯服/乏味的（cf. untamed野性的，domesticate驯化，tameable可驯的）

quiz.question: _____ ___ acme
quiz.explanation: 顶点，达到顶点。She would reach the acme of her career. 她会达到职业生涯的顶点。 | akme->顶点（希腊），acme->最高点（cf. acupuncture针灸=尖端，acumen敏锐，acute尖锐，acme巅峰）

quiz.question: sublime ______
quiz.explanation: 崇高的，崇高的美。The mountain had sublime beauty. 山有崇高的美。 | sub->在...下，lime->门槛（拉丁limen），sublime->高到门槛之上=崇高的（cf. subliminal潜意识=阈限以下，liminal过渡的）

quiz.question: _____ pantomime
quiz.explanation: 哑剧，喜剧哑剧。The actor performed a comic pantomime. 演员表演了喜剧哑剧。 | panto->全部（希腊），mime->模仿（希腊mimos），pantomime->全部用模仿表演=哑剧（cf. mime哑剧，mimic模仿，mimicry模仿）

quiz.question: prime _______
quiz.explanation: 主要的，主要嫌疑人。He was the prime suspect. 他是主要嫌疑人。 | primus->第一（拉丁），prime->第一的=主要的（cf. primary主要，principal主要，primacy首位，primer入门，prime minister首相）

quiz.question: ragtime _____
quiz.explanation: 拉格泰姆音乐，拉格泰姆音乐。Ragtime music was popular in the early 1900s. 拉格泰姆音乐在20世纪初很流行。 | rag->参差不齐的节拍，time->时间，ragtime->参差节拍音乐（来自ragged time=切分音，Scott Joplin是代表人物）

quiz.question: maritime ___
quiz.explanation: 海事的，海事法。Maritime law governs ocean disputes. 海事法管理海洋争端。 | mare->海（拉丁），maritime->海洋相关的（cf. marine海洋，submarine潜艇，mariner水手，Mediterranean地中海）

quiz.question: domed ____
quiz.explanation: 圆顶，圆顶屋顶。The building had a domed roof. 建筑有圆顶屋顶。 | domus->家/穹顶（拉丁），domed->有圆顶的（cf. dome穹顶，domestic家庭，domicile住所，domain领域，dominant主导）

quiz.question: _____ genome
quiz.explanation: 基因组，人类基因组。Scientists mapped the human genome. 科学家绘制了人类基因组。 | gen->产生（希腊），ome->整体，genome->基因的整体（cf. gene基因，genesis起源，generate产生，genetic遗传，genotype基因型）

quiz.question: ______ gnome
quiz.explanation: 侏儒，花园侏儒。A garden gnome decorated the lawn. 花园侏儒装饰着草坪。 | gnomes->地下知识者（希腊，gnosis->知识），gnome->地下守护精灵（cf. gnomic格言式，agnostic不可知论，diagnosis诊断）

quiz.question: frolicsome _______
quiz.explanation: 爱嬉戏的，爱嬉戏的小狗。The frolicsome puppies played all day. 爱嬉戏的小狗整天玩耍。 | frolic->嬉戏（荷兰语vrolijk->快乐），frolicsome->爱嬉戏的（cf. playful爱玩的，gamesome爱玩的，rollicking嬉闹）

quiz.question: wholesome ____
quiz.explanation: 有益健康的，有益健康的饮食。She maintained a wholesome diet. 她保持有益健康的饮食。 | whole->整体，some->具有...性质，wholesome->对整体有益的（cf. whole整体，holistic整体性，loathsome令人厌恶）

quiz.question: mettlesome _____
quiz.explanation: 精神抖擞的，精神抖擞的马。The mettlesome horse was spirited. 精神抖擞的马很有活力。 | mettle->勇气（metal变体），mettlesome->充满勇气的（cf. mettle勇气，spirited精神抖擞，fiery烈性）

quiz.question: noisome ____
quiz.explanation: 恶臭的，恶臭的气味。A noisome odor filled the room. 恶臭的气味充满了房间。 | noy->伤害（古法语nuire），noisome->造成伤害的/恶臭的（注意 noisome 不等于 noisy，cf. annoy烦扰，nuisance烦扰，noxious有毒）

quiz.question: irksome ____
quiz.explanation: 令人厌烦的，令人厌烦的任务。Filing paperwork was an irksome task. 归档文件是令人厌烦的任务。 | irk->烦扰（来源不明），irksome->令人烦扰的（cf. irritate激怒，vexing烦人，tedious乏味，annoying烦人的）

quiz.question: fulsome ______
quiz.explanation: 过分的，过分的赞美。The fulsome praise seemed insincere. 过分的赞美似乎不真诚。 | full->充满，some->过多，fulsome->过分充满的=谄媚的（cf. full满，cf. fulsome praise过分的赞美=谄媚）

quiz.question: winsome _____
quiz.explanation: 迷人的，迷人的微笑。She had a winsome smile. 她有迷人的微笑。 | wynn->喜悦（古英语），winsome->令人喜悦的=迷人的（cf. win赢/吸引，winsome迷人，wistful渴望的）

quiz.question: _____ chromosome
quiz.explanation: 染色体，人类染色体。Human chromosome carry genetic information. 人类染色体携带遗传信息。 | chroma->颜色（希腊），soma->身体，chromosome->被染色的身体=染色体（cf. chromatic半音阶，monochrome单色，somatic体细胞的）

quiz.question: cumbersome _______
quiz.explanation: 笨重的，笨重的过程。The application was a cumbersome process. 申请是笨重的过程。 | cumber->妨碍（古法语combrer），cumbersome->令人妨碍的=笨重的（cf. encumber妨碍，encumbrance负担，lumbering笨重）

quiz.question: lissome ______
quiz.explanation: 柔软的，柔软的身材。The gymnast had a lissome figure. 体操运动员有柔软的身材。 | lithe->柔软，some->具有...性质，lissome->lithe+some=柔韧优美的（cf. lithe柔软，supple柔韧，agile敏捷）

quiz.question: ___ epitome __
quiz.explanation: 典范，典范。He was the epitome of elegance. 他是优雅的典范。 | epi->在...上，tom->切（希腊temnein），epitome->切出来的精华=典范（cf. atom原子=不可切的，anatomy解剖，tome大卷，dichotomy二分）

quiz.question: exhume _______
quiz.explanation: 挖出，挖出遗体。Authorities would exhume remains for investigation. 当局会挖出遗体进行调查。 | ex->向外，hume->土（拉丁humus），exhume->从土中挖出（cf. humble谦逊=贴近土，humility谦逊，posthumous遗腹=土后，inhume埋葬）

quiz.question: subsume _____
quiz.explanation: 归入，归入之下。We can subsume under this category. 我们可以归入这一类之下。 | sub->在下，sum->拿取（拉丁sumere），subsume->拿取归入下方=归入（cf. assume假设，consume消耗，presume推测，resume恢复）

quiz.question: résumé ______
quiz.explanation: 简历，简历更新。She needed to résumé update before applying. 她在申请前需要简历更新。 | re->再次，sumer->拿取，résumé->再次拿取=总结/简历（cf. resume恢复，assume假设，consume消耗，presume推测）

quiz.question: _________ costume
quiz.explanation: 服装，万圣节服装。Children wore Halloween costume. 孩子们穿万圣节服装。 | custom->习惯（拉丁consuetudo），costume->习惯穿的服装（cf. custom习俗，accustom使习惯，bespoke定制）

quiz.question: rhyme ______
quiz.explanation: 韵律，韵律方案。The poem had a complex rhyme scheme. 这首诗有复杂的韵律方案。 | rhythmos->节奏（希腊），rhyme->押韵（cf. rhythm节奏，rhyme押韵，rhapsody狂想曲，rime古词=rhyme）

quiz.question: _________ enzyme
quiz.explanation: 酶，消化酶。Digestive enzyme break down food. 消化酶分解食物。 | en->在...中，zyme->酵母（希腊zyme），enzyme->在酵母中的=酶（cf. zymology酿造学，fermentation发酵，catalyst催化剂）

quiz.question: bane __ _________
quiz.explanation: 祸根，生存的祸根。Traffic was the bane of existence for commuters. 交通是通勤者生存的祸根。 | bane->毒/祸（古英语bana->杀手），bane->祸根（cf. baneful有害，wolfsbane乌头花=毒药，boon祸福反义）

quiz.question: _______ cane
quiz.explanation: 手杖，步行手杖。The elderly man used a walking cane. 老人使用步行手杖。 | canna->芦苇（希腊），cane->芦苇茎=手杖（cf. cannon大炮=大芦苇管，canal运河，channel频道）

quiz.question: arcane ____
quiz.explanation: 神秘的，神秘的知识。He studied arcane lore. 他研究神秘的知识。 | arcanus->隐藏的（拉丁，arca->箱子），arcane->锁在箱子里的=神秘的（cf. ark方舟=隐藏的箱子，arcana秘密）

quiz.question: ultramundane _______
quiz.explanation: 超世俗的，超世俗的事务。They discussed ultramundane matters. 他们讨论超世俗的事务。 | ultra->超越，mundi->世界（拉丁mundus），ultramundane->超越世界的（cf. mundane世俗，monde世界，Monday星期一=月亮日）

quiz.question: profane ________
quiz.explanation: 亵渎的，亵渎的语言。Avoid using profane language. 避免使用亵渎的语言。 | pro->之前/外面，fane->神庙（拉丁fanum），profane->在神庙之外=亵渎的（cf. fanatic狂热者=神庙内的，sacred神圣，consecrate奉献）

quiz.question: germane ______
quiz.explanation: 相关的，相关的评论。That's a germane remark. 那是相关的评论。 | germanus->同一父母的（拉丁），germane->与主题密切相关的（cf. Germany德国=日耳曼，german兄弟/相关，germ胚芽）

quiz.question: humane _________
quiz.explanation: 人道的，人道的待遇。Animals deserve humane treatment. 动物应得人道的待遇。 | humanus->人（拉丁homo），humane->体现人性良善的（cf. human人，humanity人类，inhuman非人道，humanitarian人道主义者）

quiz.question: inhumane _________
quiz.explanation: 不人道的，不人道的待遇。The prisoners suffered inhumane treatment. 囚犯遭受不人道的待遇。 | in->否定，humane->人道的，inhumane->不人道的（cf. humane人道，inhumanity不人道，barbaric残忍）

quiz.question: ______ pane
quiz.explanation: 窗格，窗户窗格。The window pane was cracked. 窗户窗格裂了。 | pannus->布片（拉丁），pane->一块平坦的玻璃（cf. panel面板，expand展开，patchwork拼布）

quiz.question: ____ membrane
quiz.explanation: 膜，细胞膜。The cell membrane controls what enters. 细胞膜控制进入的物质。 | membrana->皮肤/膜（拉丁），membrane->生物薄膜（cf. member成员=身体部分，tympanic membrane鼓膜）

quiz.question: sane ________
quiz.explanation: 理智的，理智的判断。He made a sane judgment. 他做出了理智的判断。 | sanus->健康（拉丁），sane->心智健康的（cf. sanity理智，insane疯狂，sanatorium疗养院，sanitize消毒）

quiz.question: ____ hygiene
quiz.explanation: 卫生，良好的卫生。Maintain good hygiene habits. 保持良好的卫生习惯。 | Hygeia->健康女神（希腊），hygiene->健康女神的知识=卫生学（cf. hygienic卫生的）

quiz.question: serene ____
quiz.explanation: 宁静的，宁静的湖。The serene lake was peaceful. 宁静的湖很平静。 | serenus->晴朗（拉丁），serene->清澈宁静的（cf. serenity宁静，serenade小夜曲=宁静的夜晚音乐）

quiz.question: _____ gangrene
quiz.explanation: 坏疽，治疗坏疽。Doctors must treat gangrene quickly. 医生必须迅速治疗坏疽。 | gangraena->腐烂（希腊），gangrene->组织坏死腐烂（cf. necrosis坏死，mortification坏死=死亡化）

quiz.question: contravene ___ ___
quiz.explanation: 违反，违反法律。His actions would contravene the law. 他的行为会违反法律。 | contra->对抗，ven->来（拉丁venire），contravene->对抗而来=违反（cf. convene召集，intervene干预，event事件，adventure冒险）

quiz.question: convene _______
quiz.explanation: 召集，召集会议。The board will convene meeting tomorrow. 董事会明天将召集会议。 | con->共同，ven->来，convene->共同来到=召集（cf. convention惯例，venue场所，convenience便利）

quiz.question: intervene ________
quiz.explanation: 干预，直接干预。The government may intervene directly. 政府可能直接干预。 | inter->之间，ven->来，intervene->来到之间=干预（cf. prevent阻止=提前来，invent发明=来到内部，avenue大道）

quiz.question: recombine _____
quiz.explanation: 重组，重组基因。Scientists can recombine genes. 科学家可以重组基因。 | re->再次，combine->结合（拉丁com+bini->两两结合），recombine->再次结合=重组（cf. combine合并，combination组合，binary二进制）

quiz.question: internecine ___
quiz.explanation: 内讧的，内讧的战争。Internecine war destroyed the faction. 内讧的战争摧毁了派系。 | inter->之间，nec->杀（拉丁necare），internecine->互相杀戮的=内讧的（cf. necromancy死灵术，pernicious有害=彻底杀）

quiz.question: porcine ________
quiz.explanation: 猪的，猪的特征。He had somewhat porcine features. 他有有点猪的特征。 | porcus->猪（拉丁），porcine->猪的（cf. pork猪肉，porcelain瓷器=猪背小贝壳，porcupine豪猪=猪刺）

quiz.question: iodine ________
quiz.explanation: 碘，碘溶液。Apply iodine solution to the wound. 在伤口上涂碘溶液。 | iodes->紫色（希腊），iodine->紫色元素=碘（碘蒸气呈紫色，cf. violet紫罗兰，iridescent彩虹色）

quiz.question: ____ _ seine
quiz.explanation: 围网，撒围网。Fishermen would cast a seine. 渔民会撒围网。 | sagena->渔网（希腊），seine->大型围网（cf. Seine塞纳河，dragnet大网搜查，trawl拖网）

quiz.question: outshine ______
quiz.explanation: 胜过，胜过对手。Her performance would outshine rivals. 她的表现会胜过对手。 | out->超过，shine->光芒，outshine->光芒超过=胜过（cf. eclipse遮蔽/超越，excel超越，surpass超过，transcend超越）

quiz.question: decline __ _____
quiz.explanation: 拒绝，拒绝提议。He chose to decline an offer. 他选择拒绝提议。 | de->向下，cline->倾斜（拉丁clinare），decline->向下倾斜=减少/拒绝（cf. incline倾向，recline倾斜，climate气候=倾斜带）

quiz.question: recline ____
quiz.explanation: 倾斜，倾斜座椅。The recline seat was comfortable. 倾斜座椅很舒适。 | re->回，cline->倾斜，recline->向后倾斜（cf. incline倾向，decline拒绝，disinclination不情愿）

quiz.question: feline _____
quiz.explanation: 猫科的，猫科的优雅。The dancer moved with feline grace. 舞者以猫科的优雅移动。 | felis->猫（拉丁），feline->猫科的（cf. felid猫科动物，cat猫，feline grace猫一般的优雅）

quiz.question: aquiline ____
quiz.explanation: 鹰钩的，鹰钩鼻。He had an aquiline nose. 他有鹰钩鼻。 | aquila->鹰（拉丁），aquiline->像鹰一样弯曲的（cf. eagle鹰，Aquila天鹰座，aquiline弯钩鼻）

quiz.question: ____ discipline
quiz.explanation: 纪律，自律。Success requires self discipline. 成功需要自律。 | discere->学习（拉丁），discipline->教导的方法=纪律（cf. disciple门徒，docile温顺，doctrine教义，doctor教导者）

quiz.question: outline ______
quiz.explanation: 轮廓，轮廓草图。He drew an outline sketch. 他画了轮廓草图。 | out->外，line->线，outline->外部的线=轮廓（cf. contour轮廓线，silhouette剪影，profile侧面轮廓）

quiz.question: _________ byline
quiz.explanation: 署名，报纸署名。The newspaper byline identified the author. 报纸署名标明了作者。 | by->旁边，line->线，byline->旁边的一行=作者署名行（cf. headline头版，deadline截止线，dateline日期线）

quiz.question: ______ famine
quiz.explanation: 饥荒，严重的饥荒。The country suffered a severe famine. 该国遭受了严重的饥荒。 | fames->饥饿（拉丁），famine->大规模饥饿=饥荒（cf. famished饥饿，family家庭=同饭的人，fame名声）

quiz.question: antihistamine ____
quiz.explanation: 抗组胺药，抗组胺药物。Take an antihistamine drug for allergies. 服用抗组胺药物治疗过敏。 | anti->对抗，histamine->组胺（希腊histos->组织），antihistamine->对抗组胺的（cf. histology组织学，tissue组织）

quiz.question: undermine _____
quiz.explanation: 破坏，破坏信任。Lies will undermine trust. 谎言会破坏信任。 | under->在下，mine->挖矿，undermine->在下面挖空=破坏（cf. mine矿山/地雷，sap削弱，subvert颠覆）

quiz.question: canine _____
quiz.explanation: 犬齿，犬齿。The canine tooth is pointed. 犬齿是尖的。 | canis->狗（拉丁），canine->狗的（cf. Canis Major大犬座，kennel狗窝，canary金丝雀=犬岛之鸟，cynic犬儒派）

quiz.question: asinine _______
quiz.explanation: 愚蠢的，愚蠢的错误。That was an asinine mistake. 那是愚蠢的错误。 | asinus->驴（拉丁），asinine->像驴一样愚蠢的（cf. ass驴，donkey驴，asinine愚蠢，驴以固执愚蠢著称）

quiz.question: saturnine ___________
quiz.explanation: 阴郁的，阴郁的性情。He had a saturnine temperament. 他有阴郁的性情。 | Saturnus->土星（罗马神），saturnine->土星影响下的=阴郁的（cf. Saturn土星，Saturday土星日，martial火星=好战，mercurial水星=善变）

quiz.question: pine ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 思念，思念家乡。He would pine for home. 他会思念家乡。 | pinjan->折磨（古英语），pine->思念=折磨（cf. pain痛苦，pine松树，pining思念，pine away憔悴）

quiz.question: repine __ ____
quiz.explanation: 抱怨，抱怨命运。Don't repine at fate. 不要抱怨命运。 | re->再次，pine->思念/痛苦，repine->反复抱怨=不满（cf. pine思念，fret烦恼，grumble抱怨，complain抱怨）

quiz.question: vulpine _______
quiz.explanation: 狡猾的，狡猾的狡诈。He showed vulpine cunning. 他表现出狡猾的狡诈。 | vulpes->狐狸（拉丁），vulpine->像狐狸一样狡猾的（cf. fox狐狸，foxy狡猾，vulture秃鹫）

quiz.question: opine __ ______
quiz.explanation: 表示意见，对政策表示意见。Experts would opine on policy. 专家会对政策表示意见。 | opinari->认为（拉丁），opine->表达意见（cf. opinion意见，opinionated固执己见，opt选择，option选项）

quiz.question: margarine ______
quiz.explanation: 人造黄油，人造黄油涂抹。Use margarine spread on toast. 在吐司上使用人造黄油涂抹。 | margarites->珍珠（希腊），margarine->珍珠色泽的人造黄油（cf. Margaret珍珠之名，marguerite雏菊=小珍珠）

quiz.question: saccharine _____
quiz.explanation: 矫揉造作的，矫揉造作的微笑。Her saccharine smile seemed fake. 她矫揉造作的微笑似乎是假的。 | sukkar->糖（阿拉伯语），saccharine->含糖的=过分甜腻的（cf. saccharin糖精，sugar糖，sucrose蔗糖，glucose葡萄糖）

quiz.question: marine _________
quiz.explanation: 海洋的，海洋生物学家。The marine biologist studied coral. 海洋生物学家研究珊瑚。 | mare->海（拉丁），marine->海洋的（cf. maritime海事，submarine潜艇，mariner水手，Marina码头）

quiz.question: ______ shrine
quiz.explanation: 神社，神道神社。They visited a Shinto shrine. 他们参观了神道神社。 | scrinium->箱子（拉丁），shrine->放置圣物的盒子=神龛（cf. screen屏幕，scribe书记，enshrine供奉）

quiz.question: enshrine __________
quiz.explanation: 铭记，铭记原则。The constitution would enshrine principles. 宪法会铭记原则。 | en->使，shrine->神龛，enshrine->放入神龛=铭记（cf. consecrate奉献，immortalize使不朽，sanctify神圣化）

quiz.question: _________ doctrine
quiz.explanation: 教义，宗教教义。They followed religious doctrine. 他们遵循宗教教义。 | docere->教（拉丁），doctrine->被教导的内容=教义（cf. doctor博士，disciple门徒，docile温顺，indoctrinate灌输）

quiz.question: ____ figurine
quiz.explanation: 小雕像，陶土小雕像。She collected clay figurine. 她收集陶土小雕像。 | figura->形状（拉丁），figurine->小形状=小雕像（cf. figure图形，configure配置，disfigure破坏外形）

quiz.question: tambourine ______
quiz.explanation: 铃鼓，铃鼓节奏。The tambourine rhythm added energy. 铃鼓节奏增添了活力。 | tambour->鼓（法语，阿拉伯语tanbur->弦鼓），tambourine->小鼓=铃鼓（cf. drum鼓，timbre音色，tabor小鼓）

quiz.question: ______ cuisine
quiz.explanation: 烹饪，法国烹饪。French cuisine is world famous. 法国烹饪举世闻名。 | coquere->烹饪（拉丁），cuisine->烹饪风格（cf. cook烹饪，kitchen厨房，culinary烹饪的，biscuit饼干=烤两次）

quiz.question: ursine ________
quiz.explanation: 熊的，熊的力量。He had ursine strength. 他有熊的力量。 | ursus->熊（拉丁），ursine->熊的（cf. Ursa Major大熊座，arctic北极=熊星下方，Ursula小熊名字）

quiz.question: _______ limousine
quiz.explanation: 豪华轿车，加长豪华轿车。They arrived in a stretch limousine. 他们乘坐加长豪华轿车到达。 | Limousin->法国利穆赞地区（以驾驶马车著称），limousine->利穆赞马车夫穿的斗篷式汽车（cf. limo豪华轿车）

quiz.question: elephantine ____
quiz.explanation: 笨重的，笨重的体积。The elephantine bulk was impressive. 笨重的体积令人印象深刻。 | elephas->象（希腊），elephantine->像大象一样笨重的（cf. elephant大象，ivory象牙，elephantiasis象皮病）

quiz.question: ______ quarantine
quiz.explanation: 隔离，实施隔离。Authorities would impose quarantine. 当局会实施隔离。 | quaranta->四十（意大利语），quarantine->四十天隔离（cf. quarter四分之一，quartet四重奏，squad小分队）

quiz.question: byzantine ___________
quiz.explanation: 复杂的，复杂的官僚机构。The byzantine bureaucracy was confusing. 复杂的官僚机构令人困惑。 | Byzantium->拜占庭（古城名），byzantine->拜占庭帝国式的=过度复杂的（cf. labyrinthine迷宫般，convoluted复杂）

quiz.question: ___ ___ guillotine
quiz.explanation: 断头台，使用断头台。They would use the guillotine for execution. 他们会使用断头台处决。 | Guillotin->约瑟夫-伊尼亚斯·吉约坦医生（提议人道执刑），guillotine->以医生名字命名的断头台（cf. eponymous以人名命名）

quiz.question: libertine _________
quiz.explanation: 放荡的，放荡的生活方式。He led a libertine lifestyle. 他过着放荡的生活方式。 | liber->自由（拉丁），libertine->过度自由的人=放荡者（cf. liberty自由，liberate解放，liberal自由的）

quiz.question: predestine ____
quiz.explanation: 预定，预定命运。Some believe fate is predestined. 有些人相信命运是预定的。 | pre->之前，destin->注定（拉丁destinare），predestine->提前注定（cf. destiny命运，destination目的地）

quiz.question: clandestine _______
quiz.explanation: 秘密的，秘密的会议。They held a clandestine meeting. 他们举行了秘密的会议。 | clam->秘密（拉丁clam->暗中），clandestine->秘密进行的（cf. claim声称，exclaim呼喊，clandestinely秘密地）

quiz.question: _____ intestine
quiz.explanation: 肠，小肠。The small intestine absorbs nutrients. 小肠吸收营养。 | intus->内部（拉丁），intestine->内部的器官=肠（cf. internal内部，intestinal肠的，intrinsic内在）

quiz.question: ________ philistine
quiz.explanation: 庸俗的人，文化庸俗的人。He was a cultural philistine. 他是文化庸俗的人。 | Philistines->腓力斯丁人（圣经中以色列的敌人），philistine->缺乏文化修养的庸俗者（cf. barbarian野蛮人）

quiz.question: pristine _________
quiz.explanation: 原始的，原始的状态。The car was in pristine condition. 汽车处于原始的状态。 | pristinus->原始的（拉丁），pristine->最初状态的=完好如新的（cf. previous以前，prior之前，prime第一）

quiz.question: sanguine _______
quiz.explanation: 乐观的，乐观的展望。He maintained a sanguine outlook. 他保持乐观的展望。 | sanguis->血液（拉丁），sanguine->血液质的=乐观的（古医学四体液，血液充沛=开朗乐观，cf. sanguinary血腥，consanguine同血缘）

quiz.question: genuine _______
quiz.explanation: 真正的，真正的皮革。The bag was made of genuine leather. 包是用真正的皮革制成的。 | genu->膝盖（拉丁），genuine->膝盖上的=真实的（古罗马父亲将孩子放膝盖上以承认其为亲生，cf. genital生殖，progenitor祖先）

quiz.question: equine _______
quiz.explanation: 马的，马疗法。Equine therapy helps with disabilities. 马疗法有助于治疗残疾。 | equus->马（拉丁），equine->马的（cf. equestrian骑马的，equinox昼夜平分，equity公平，equator赤道）

quiz.question: divine ____________
quiz.explanation: 神圣的，神圣的干预。They prayed for divine intervention. 他们祈求神圣的干预。 | divus->神（拉丁，Jupiter=Jove=天神），divine->与神有关的（cf. divinity神性，divination占卜）

quiz.question: bovine _____
quiz.explanation: 牛的，牛血清。Bovine serum is used in research. 牛血清用于研究。 | bos->牛（拉丁），bovine->牛的（cf. beef牛肉，butter黄油=牛产的，bison野牛）

quiz.question: _____ intertwine
quiz.explanation: 缠绕，藤蔓缠绕。The vines intertwine together. 藤蔓缠绕在一起。 | inter->互相，twine->缠绕，intertwine->互相缠绕（cf. twin双胞胎=缠在一起，entangle缠绕，interweave交织）

quiz.question: _____-__ comedienne
quiz.explanation: 女喜剧演员，单口女喜剧演员。The stand-up comedienne was hilarious. 单口女喜剧演员非常搞笑。 | komos->狂欢游行（希腊），enne->法语女性后缀，comedienne->女喜剧演员（cf. comedy喜剧，comedian男喜剧演员）

quiz.question: _______ cone
quiz.explanation: 锥体，交通锥体。Place traffic cone around the work zone. 在工作区周围放置交通锥体。 | konos->锥（希腊），cone->锥形物（cf. icon图像，pine cone松果=锥形）
